archived_scenarios.title: Full-Time Shift with Skill Pivot
archived_scenarios.summary: Theo transitions to full-time freelancing by year 2 after overcoming undercharging through targeted social calendar events, building a modest portfolio with motion design and basic 3D skills from consistent learning investments. Debt is cleared by year 3 via higher rates and steady gigs, including Austin mural outreach leads, though ADHD requires productivity hacks. He relocates to Portland after testing cities, blending design identity with emerging relationships from networking.
